title: Ship v9.0 External Runtime Operator Acceptance and Safety Drill
description: Implement the v9.0 operator acceptance drill: a canonical operator decision record for external runtime chains, audit coverage for accept/stop/rollback/escalate/defer states, Mission Control projection of operator decision and unresolved blockers, release-state gate integration, docs, tests, and release closure.
triage_notes: v9.0 operator acceptance drill release evidence completed and Council-approved.
